10010111011010111111101001101100100111010101101001010001100111101111000000010101 - ASI: 32

Rules:
  00 = 0 * 0
  10 = 1 * 0
  11 = 1 * 1
  011 = 0 * 11
  101 = 10 * 1
  111 = 1 * 11
  0000 = 00 * 00
  0010 = 00 * 10
  0101 = 0 * 101
  01100 = 011 * 00
  10100 = 101 * 00
  11011 = 11 * 011
  11110 = 111 * 10
  11111 = 11 * 111
  011101 = 011 * 101
  100101 = 10 * 0101
  0010101 = 0010 * 101
  010110100 = 0101 * 10100
  010111111 = 0101 * 11111
  0010011101 = 0010 * 011101
  1010001100 = 10100 * 01100
  1010011011 = 10100 * 11011
  1111011110 = 11110 * 11110
  00000010101 = 0000 * 0010101
  10010111011 = 100101 * 11011
  0101101001010001100 = 010110100 * 1010001100
  10010111011010111111 = 10010111011 * 010111111
  10100110110010011101 = 1010011011 * 0010011101
  111101111000000010101 = 1111011110 * 00000010101
  0101101001010001100111101111000000010101 = 0101101001010001100 * 111101111000000010101
  1001011101101011111110100110110010011101 = 10010111011010111111 * 10100110110010011101
  10010111011010111111101001101100100111010101101001010001100111101111000000010101 = 1001011101101011111110100110110010011101 * 0101101001010001100111101111000000010101
